seoTitle: Mount Ousley vs Mount Pleasant — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Ousley and Mount Pleasant. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Ousley vs Mount Pleasant: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Ousley and Mount Pleasant.
heading: Mount Ousley vs Mount Pleasant — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Ousley, New South Wales and Mount Pleasant, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Pleasant has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Mount Ousley (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Ousley or Mount Pleasant safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Ousley has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Mount Pleasant scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Ousley scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Pleasant scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Ousley or Mount Pleasant?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Pleasant has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
